title: Easy Aloe Vera Non-Bio Washing Powder, Gentle on Skin, Powerful on Stains, Aloe Fresh Fragrance, Detergent for Sensitive Skin, Family Safe Formula, XL Value Pack (75 Washes)
features: GENTLE CARE FOR SENSITIVE SKIN: Specially formulated without harsh biological enzymes, Easy Aloe Vera Non-Bio Washing Powder is the perfect solution for delicate, sensitive, or allergy-prone skin. Its mild, dermatologically tested formula ensures a soothing wash that helps prevent irritation, itching, or dryness, even on baby clothes and bedding. Despite its gentle nature, it delivers deep, hygienic cleaning performance, removing dirt and stains effectively while being kind to skin and fabrics alike.

INFUSED WITH ALOE VERA FOR SOOTHING SOFTNESS: Infused with natural Aloe Vera extracts, this washing powder goes beyond cleaning — it nourishes and protects both fabric and skin. Each wash leaves clothes soft, smooth, and naturally refreshed, helping them feel comfortable against even the most delicate skin. The gentle Aloe Vera formula maintains fabric quality and texture, ensuring that garments stay beautifully clean, touchable soft, and lightly scented — ideal for everyday wear by the whole family.

POWERFUL CLEANING WITH ALOE FRESH FRAGRANCE: Experience the perfect balance of performance and fragrance with Easy Aloe Vera Non-Bio Washing Powder. Its advanced stain-fighting formula penetrates deep into fabrics to lift away dirt, grease, and stubborn stains — even at lower temperatures. At the same time, the Aloe Fresh fragrance leaves every load smelling crisp, clean, and uplifting all day long. Designed to deliver brilliant whites and vibrant colours, it ensures your clothes look and smell their best after every wash.

XL VALUE PACK FOR 75 WASHES: Enjoy long-lasting freshness and unbeatable value with the Easy Aloe Vera Non-Bio Mega XL Pack, delivering up to 75 powerful washes per box. Perfect for large or busy households, this generous pack ensures you’re always stocked up for weeks of effortless laundry care. Each scoop provides consistent cleaning results, keeping clothes soft, fresh, and beautifully clean wash after wash.

SAFE FOR ALL FABRICS & COLOURS: Designed for versatility, Easy Aloe Vera Non-Bio works effectively on cotton, synthetics, linens, and mixed fabrics, protecting both whites and colours from fading. It keeps clothes bright, soft, and comfortable — preserving fabric quality with every wash.
description: Keep your home sparkling clean and germ-free with Easy Thin Bleach Mega XXL, the powerful disinfectant cleaner designed to tackle dirt, grime, and harmful bacteria with ease. Formulated to kill 99.9% of germs and viruses, this multi-purpose bleach ensures long-lasting hygiene and freshness throughout your home. Perfect for toilets, sinks, drains, floors, tiles, and worktops, its thin liquid formula flows easily into hard-to-reach areas, delivering deep disinfection and odour removal where it’s needed most. It not only cleans but also eliminates unpleasant smells at their source, leaving behind a fresh, hygienic scent after every use. Whether you’re performing a quick daily clean or a deep disinfection, Easy Thin Bleach provides 24-hour antibacterial protection, keeping your environment safe and sanitized all day long. Its fast-acting formula begins working immediately upon contact, saving you time and effort while ensuring visible results within minutes. Crafted for both residential and commercial use, this bleach is trusted by households, offices, schools, and cleaning professionals for its proven effectiveness. The Mega XXL bottle offers outstanding value, delivering extended use and convenient storage. Its secure cap and ergonomic handle make pouring safe and easy, while the sturdy packaging prevents leaks and spills. Use it to disinfect surfaces, whiten tiles, clean drains, and destroy odours — all in one powerful solution. With Easy Thin Bleach, maintaining hygiene has never been simpler or more effective.
